message:
Major expansion of pattern matching and output rendering capabilities

- patterns.rs: Add 250+ lines of pattern matching infrastructure including
  composite pattern types, negation support, lookahead/lookbehind simulation,
  pattern compilation with caching, match context extraction for debugging
- renderers.rs: Implement multiple output format renderers (JSON, YAML, table,
  tree view), add syntax highlighting for terminal output, implement streaming
  renderer for large outputs, add indentation and wrapping support
- output/mod.rs: Wire up new renderers to output dispatch, add format
  auto-detection from terminal capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
